notes: Folder library: drag-and-drop a book onto a folder, or long-press / right-click to move or copy
Server-side cloud moves — re-foldering a synced book no longer re-uploads it
Settings reorganised into collapsible Display, Fonts and Margins groups
Fixed long-press selecting page text on Android
Automatic versioning: release.sh bumps the version per commit and shows release notes in Help
Selective Google Drive sync — opt in per book; reading progress merges by furthest position
Live sync progress: per-file status, percentage and progress bar
Sign out while keeping local data; offline eviction of unopened downloads
Reader enhancements: reading view, player and library refinements
